input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.1.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.1.2.2
            TITLE: staging area – any area(s) inside the dynamic area prior to the entry to an event for the

            CONTENT:
            rule D.1.2.2: Staging Area – Any area(s) inside the Dynamic Area prior to the entry to an event for the
D.1.2.2 Staging Area – Any area(s) inside the Dynamic Area prior to the entry to an event for the 
purpose of gathering those vehicles that are about to start.

final_answer: D.1.2.2 Staging Area – Any area(s) inside the Dynamic Area prior to the entry to an event for the purpose of gathering those vehicles that are about to start.
